challenges.name: WatcherBingoAllRegionsExceptChallenge
challenges.toDesc: return "Enter " + (((p.required - p.current) > 1) ? String(p.required - p.current) + " more regions" : (((p.required - p.current) > 0) ? "one more region" : "no more regions") ) + " without entering " + this.regionToDisplayText(this.board.character, p.region) + ".";
challenges.toComment: return "This challenge is potentially quite customizable; only regions in the list need to be entered. Normally, the list is populated with all campaign story regions (i.e. corresponding Wanderer pips), so that progress can be checked on the sheltering screen. All that matters towards completion, is current equaling amount; thus we can set a lower bar and play a \"The Wanderer\"-lite; or we could set a specific collection of regions to enter, to entice players towards them. Downside: the latter functionality is not currently supported in-game: the region list is something of a mystery unless viewed and manually tracked. (This goal generates with all regions listed, so that all will contribute towards the goal.)";

challenges.name: WatcherBingoCollectRippleSpawnChallenge
challenges.toComment: return "Ripple Spawn eggs become visible when the player has reinforced Karma, is holding a Karma Flower, or if the Dial Warp perk is enabled.";

challenges.name: WatcherBingoCreaturePortalChallenge
challenges.category: Transporting the same creature through portals
challenges.toDesc: return "Transport the same " + this.entityNameQuantify(1, p.crit, false) + " through " + this.entityNameQuantify(p.amount, "portals") + ".";

challenges.name: WatcherBingoEnterRegionChallenge
WatcherBingoHatchMothGrubChallenge
challenges.toComment: return "Big Moths nest on the grounds of Shrouded Stacks, dropping their larvae off in open rooms of the region. A Grub can be lugged to a nearby shelter, to hibernate and hatch.";

challenges.name: WatcherBingoPrinceChallenge
WatcherBingoNoRegionChallenge
WatcherBingoOpenMelonsChallenge
WatcherBingoSpinningTopChallenge
challenges.toDesc: return "Visit Spinning Top " + (p.specific ? ("in " + this.regionToDisplayText(this.board.character, p.spinner) + " Echo") : (p.amount <= 1 ? "once" : String(p.amount) + " times")) + (p.starve ? ", while starving." : ".");

challenges.name: WatcherBingoWeaverChallenge
